name: perspective
description: An AI Concierge replaces static forms with adaptive AI conversations that understand real situations, structure key information automatically, and trigger the right next step.
long_description: Perspective AI is the platform for qualitative customer conversations at scale. It replaces static surveys, forms, and manual interviews with intelligent AI agents (Concierge, Interviewer, Evaluator, Advocate) that have natural, deep conversations with your customers, then synthesizes the results into actionable insights. With this extension, your AI assistant can create conversation agents, analyze conversations, deploy embeds, and automate follow-ups without leaving your IDE or desktop client.

access_token.title: Access Token
access_token.description: Your Perspective AI MCP access token. Generate one at Settings > MCP.

server_url.title: Server URL
server_url.description: Perspective AI MCP server URL (only change for self-hosted instances)

tools.name: workspace_list
tools.description: List all workspaces you have access to

tools.name: workspace_get
tools.description: Get details of a specific workspace

tools.name: perspective_list
tools.description: List all perspectives in a workspace

tools.name: perspective_create
tools.description: Create a new perspective from natural language

tools.name: perspective_respond
tools.description: Answer a follow-up question during perspective creation

tools.name: perspective_get_stats
tools.description: Get aggregate statistics for a perspective

tools.name: perspective_get_conversations_batch
tools.description: Get batch of conversations for analysis

tools.name: perspective_get_preview_link
tools.description: Get shareable preview link for a perspective

tools.name: participant_invite
tools.description: Create magic-link invites for participants, optionally sent via email

tools.name: automation_manage
tools.description: Create, list, update, delete, toggle, or test automations (webhook, email, Slack, HubSpot)

tools.name: integration_manage
tools.description: List providers (Slack, HubSpot), connect them, and search their tools
